description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a dark hip roof and a stone-clad foundation. The exterior features a mix of tan brickwork and decorative stonework, especially around the base and chimney. The house has multiple windows arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with a prominent balcony and wooden railings on one side. The main entryway is accessed by a set of steps leading to a small porch, flanked by shrubs and a paved walkway. The property is surrounded by a simple lawn and is set on a rectangular plot with a driveway and additional side entrance. The overall design is practical and suburban, with classic residential features.
description: A two-story tan brick house with a dark hip roof, stone foundation, and symmetrical windows. Features include a balcony, porch entry, and landscaped lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with steps, porch, balcony above, and a row of shrubs along the walkway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the balcony, side entrance, and the extended roof overhang with visible windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a secondary entry with steps, large windows, and extensive stonework on the lower facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, side entrance, and a covered area beneath the roof overhang.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with some asymmetrical side placements
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with steps, small porch, wooden railing, and a paved walkway flanked by shrubs
